title: Hapalochilus geniculifer
taxonomy: Hapalochilus geniculifer is classified within the family Gesneriaceae, which includes the African violet and the genus Hapalochilus. The family Gesneriaceae is further grouped into the order Lamiales, which comprises a wide range of flowering plants. The order Lamiales is part of the clade Asterids, a large group of flowering plants that also includes the rose, lavender, and mint families. Within the clade Asterids, the Lamiales order is distinct and contains a diverse array of plant species. This classification reflects the evolutionary history of Hapalochilus geniculifer and its unique characteristics within the plant kingdom.
